title: Kconaland 2: Don't look up!
description: Kconaland 2 is a modpack centered around magic and technology in which the overworld has been divided into floating islands.
body:
![Kconaland 2 title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f7a67a7a60ea0159cc6499f7836374fcf5e923.png)

This modpack draws inspiration from the [Sky Islands](https://zelda.fandom.com/wiki/Sky_Islands) featured in the game **Tears of the Kingdom**. It offers a captivating blend of features, including dimension stacking, advanced Create technology, and a rich array of magical elements. Dive in to discover and explore the many surprises and adventures that await you.

Apart from the mods included in the modpack it also uses:
- [Simple Create Radios](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-create-radios) texture pack
- [Tom's Create Storage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/toms-create-storage) texture pack
- [TOTW Modded FWaystones Compat](https://github.com/HaXrDEV/TOTW-Modded-FWaystones-Compat) datapack
